eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace hibernate-core and hibernate-testing dependencies with flexmark-all and owasp-java-html-sanitizer.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: The old Hibernate dependencies were likely managed by Spring Boot or redundant; the new dependencies are required for markdown processing and HTML sanitization features added in this migration.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Add MariaDB JDBC driver dependency for database connectivity.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: The application requires a JDBC driver for MariaDB which was not present or explicitly versioned before.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Change project packaging from war to jar to align with Spring Boot executable jar standards.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot applications are typically deployed as executable jars; war packaging is legacy for external servlet containers.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Update groupId, artifactId, and name to reflect new project identity (com.techreier.edrops).
Add Jib Maven plugin configuration for containerizing the application with a Java 21 base image.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin with explicit main class for the new package structure.
Comment out spring-boot-starter-tomcat 'provided' scope to include Tomcat in the jar for standalone execution.
Update H2 database version to 2.2.220 for compatibility with newer Spring Boot versions.

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Enable virtual threads for improved concurrency performance in Java 21.
Switch default active profile from implicit/default to 'h2' for explicit configuration management.
Update Thymeleaf mode from deprecated HTML5 to HTML for modern template processing.
Enable Tomcat relaxed path and query characters to support special characters in URLs.
Add explicit error page path configuration for Spring Boot error handling.
Add logging level configurations for various packages to control log verbosity.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
logging:
  level:
    root: INFO
    org.springframework: WARN
    org.springframework.security: WARN
    org.apache.coyote.http11: INFO
    com.techreier.edrops: INFO
    org.hibernate: INFO
    org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind: INFO
    org.hibernate.SQL: INFO

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Add logging pattern configuration for console output formatting.
Disable Thymeleaf caching in default profile for development convenience.
Set web resources cache period to 3600 seconds for better performance.
Disable Spring DevTools livereload in default profile for production-like behavior.
Remove static resource location override to use default Spring Boot static resources.
Add application name configuration with environment variable fallback.
Add user configuration with environment variable fallback.
Add password configuration with environment variable fallback.
Add explicit server port configuration for embedded Tomcat.
Disable throwing exception if no handler found to avoid 404 errors.
Disable open-in-view for JPA to prevent lazy loading issues.
Add h2disk profile for H2 file-based database configuration.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
---
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: h2disk
  jpa:
    generate-ddl: true
    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.H2Dialect
    defer-datasource-initialization: true
    properties:
      hibernate.show_sql: false
  datasource:
    driverClassName: org.h2.Driver
    url: jdbc:h2:file:C:/h2/edrops
    username: sa
    password: sa
  thymeleaf.cache: true
  web.resources.cache.period: 3600
  h2:
    console.enabled: true

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Add local-mariadb profile for local MariaDB database configuration.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
---
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: local-mariadb
  jpa:
    generate-ddl: true
    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MariaDBDialect
    defer-datasource-initialization: true
    properties:
      hibernate.show_sql: false
  datasource:
    driverClassName: org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver
    url: jdbc:mariadb://localhost:3307/edrops?useSSL=false&useUnicode=yes&characterEncoding=UTF-8&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=UTC
    username: dbuser
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD}

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Add docker-mariadb profile for Docker-based MariaDB database configuration.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
---
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: docker-mariadb
  jpa:
    generate-ddl: true
    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MariaDBDialect
    defer-datasource-initialization: true
    properties:
      hibernate.show_sql: false
  datasource:
    driverClassName: org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver
    url: jdbc:mariadb://host.docker.internal:3307/edrops?useSSL=false&useUnicode=yes&characterEncoding=UTF-8&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=UTC
    username: dbuser
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD}
  thymeleaf.cache: true
  web.resources.cache.period: 3600

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Add mariadb-dockerized profile for Dockerized MariaDB database configuration.

  thymeleaf.cache: true

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Add global-mariadb profile for global MariaDB database configuration.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
---
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: global-mariadb
  jpa:
    generate-ddl: true
    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MariaDBDialect
    defer-datasource-initialization: true
    properties:
      hibernate.show_sql: false
  datasource:
    driverClassName: org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver
    url: jdbc:mariadb://mdb:3308/edrops?useSSL=false&useUnicode=yes&characterEncoding=UTF-8&serverTimezone=UTC
    username: dbuser
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD}
  thymeleaf.cache: true
  web.resources.cache.period: 3600
